Details: Bookmark repair station for INC airlift / respawn.
Acts on activator

Semantics.SummaryLong: FUN_00521e00(GenericVar1) stores repair-station id on the player character (offsets 0x740/0x744) and updates world position via FUN_004d38b0. This is the "last repair station visited" used by INC.
FieldLabels: Repair station id (map object index): spawndeletevar1 (1)

Details: Complete current mission objective for mission id.
For all players

Semantics.SummaryLong: FUN_00533f90(missionId, 0xFFFFFFFF, 0xFFFFFFFF, 1) advances objective chain, grants rewards/XP/credits, may show "Completed!" UI. ObjectiveIDCheck in map file is validated in CanTrigger, not passed to handler.

We at Robobank can help you with all your financial needs.  That�s everything from loans to mutation insurance!  Robobank, because in these troubled times, your bank should be the last thing you worry about.
